mnemonics: FINALLY: For Important, Non-recoverable, And Long-lasting Yields - Always runs to guarantee cleanup
keyPoints: finally block always executes regardless of whether an exception occurs
Use finally for cleanup code like closing files or database connections
finally executes even if there's a return statement in try or catch block
commonMistakes: Placing return statements in finally block (can suppress exceptions)
Forgetting that System.exit() in try/catch prevents finally from executing
Putting resource cleanup in try block instead of finally (may not execute if exception occurs)
